quests.name: Canine Cuisine
objectives: Go inside Chez Remy with Lady.
Go back inside Chez Remy with Lady.

Have some fun with Lady around the Valley!
  ‧ Follow Lady to a new smell she picked up in the Peaceful Meadow.
Hang out with Lady.

Have some fun with Lady around the Peaceful Meadow!
  ‧ Dig for 3 bones.
  ‧ Fetch 3 Villagers their favorite gifts.
  ‧ Feed a cute bunny.
Return to Lady.
Go to Chez Remy.
Talk to Lady.

Gather the Ingredients for the Doggy Donut.
  ‧ 1 Purple Fruit fallen from a mad tree?
  ‧ 2 Wheat.
  ‧ 2 Peanut.
  ‧ 2 Egg.
Cook the Doggy Donut.

Something is off about this Doggy Donut.
  ‧ Bring the strange Doggy Donut to Lady.
  ‧ Make sure you have the Doggy Donut in your Inventory.

Lady has caught a strange scent...
  ‧ Follow Lady as she tracks the scent...
  ‧ Talk to Lady.

Follow the purple cat tracks starting from the Dazzle Beach stairs.
  ‧ Find the source of the cat tracks.
Follow the purple tracks on Dazzle Beach and enter the Cursed Cave...
Cheshire Cat is behind this! Talk to him.
Go to Cheshire Cat in the Cursed Cave.

Make peace between Lady and the Cheshire Cat.
  ‧ Cook the proper Doggy Donut.

Make peace between Lady and the Cheshire Cat.
  ‧ Place the Edwardian Dog Bowl near the Cheshire Cat's Tree.
Return to the Cheshire Cat's Tree.
Talk to Cheshire Cat at his tree.

quests.name: A Little Off the Top
objectives:
Gather materials for the Pet Grooming Station.
  ‧ 12 Hardwood.
  ‧ 3 Gold Ingot.
  ‧ 3 Fabric.
  ‧ 3 Glass.
  ‧ Ask a fur-covered Villager for some Thick-Fur Shampoo.
Craft the Pet Grooming Station.

Make sure you have the items in your Inventory.
  ‧ Pet Grooming Station.
  ‧ Thick-Fur Shampoo.
Give the Pet Grooming Station to Daisy.

Gather dog grooming items in various Houses.
  ‧ Scissors and Brush Kit from the Boutique.
  ‧ Spa Towels from Arendelle Castle.
  ‧ Hair Brush and Soap from Minnie's House.
Head back inside Daisy's House to check in on Lady's haircut.
Talk to Lady.
Clean up the 8 soap suds in Daisy's House using your Royal Watering Can.
Place the grooming supplies on the Pet Grooming Station in Daisy's House.
Talk to Lady near the Pet Grooming Station.
Place the Edwardian Grooming Station in your House.
Talk to Lady.

quests.name: Getting on Like Cats and Dogs
objectives: Go to the Sunlit Plateau.
Follow Lady as she tracks Nala's scent.

Lady is having trouble following Nala's scent.
  ‧ Wear the Substitute Snout to help pick up Nala's trail again.

Follow Nala's scent while wearing the Substitute Snout.
  ‧ Find Nala's training ground on the Sunlit Plateau.
Enter Nala's training ground in the Vitalys Mines.
Talk to Lady in the Vitalys Mines.

Follow Nala's scent in the Vitalys Mines while wearing the Substitute Snout.
  ‧ Evade all the 6 enchanted spotlights.
  ‧ Catch your prey: the 5 Enchanted Squeaky Toys.

You've found Nala in the Mines... or she found you!
  ‧ Talk to Nala.

Continue to test your stealth and pouncing skills!
  ‧ Catch all the 5 moving Enchanted Squeaky Toys while not stepping under the spotlights.

Lady also caught an Enchanted Squeaky Toy!
  ‧ Show Nala the Enchanted Squeaky Toys that you and Lady caught.

Lady is proud of her accomplishment!
  ‧ Talk to Tramp to tell him about Lady's training.

Scar took Tramp's favorite bones!
  ‧ Confront him.

Find Tramp's Bones:
  ‧ Near the parent of glass where waves lap and turtles play.
  ‧ Swimming deep in mud and muck, where crocodiles roam.
  ‧ Seek the border between forest and frost and the gift that snow grants to flame.
Track Scar's scent with the Substitute Snout.
Make sure you have all the 3 Tramp's Favorite Bones
Give all the Tramp's Favorite Bones to Tramp.
Wear the Lady Bejeweled Necklace.

This necklace really matches Lady and Tramp's medals!
  ‧ Take a selfie with Lady and Tramp in their House.

quests.name: Portrait of a Lady
objectives:
Find the Posh Furniture in the Lady and the Tramp Realm.
  ‧ Posh Chair.
  ‧ Posh Curtain Stand.
  ‧ Posh Curtains.
  ‧ Edwardian Portrait Frame.
Meet Lady in her House to discuss the photo shoot.
Place the Posh Furniture in the photo shoot setup.
See if Lady likes the way you set up the Posh Furniture.

Ask around about items for the photo shoot:
  ‧ Joy.
  ‧ Goofy.
  ‧ Alice.

Find all the items for the photo shoot:
  ‧ 4 Broken Photo Shoot Spotlight stuck in rocks in the Vitalys Mines.
  ‧ 1 Broken Antique Camera in the Glade's river.
  ‧ 1 Antique Camera Lens in Mickey's secret room in the Dream Castle.

Gather materials to repair the Antique Camera and the Spotlights.
  ‧ 5 Tinkering Parts.
  ‧ 3 Hardwood.
  ‧ 4 Glass.

Repair the photography supplies at a Crafting Station.
  ‧ Antique Film Camera.
  ‧ Photo Shoot Spotlight.
Return to Lady's House with the Antique Camera and Spotlights.
Place the Antique Camera and Spotlights near the photo shoot setup.

Talk to Lady to start the portrait shoot.
  ‧ Let Lady place herself for the photo shoot.

Place the Lady and Tramp Portrait Photo Shoot. outside, anywhere in the Valley.
  ‧ (Optional) Unlock the Edwardian Photo Frame from your Inventory.
Take a selfie with Lady and Tramp.
Talk to Lady.
Place the Canine Family Portrait on a wall in Lady and Tramp's House.
Talk to Lady.

quests.name: The Spaghetti Incident
objectives:
Is that a rolling ball of spaghetti?!
  ‧ Catch the 4 Rolling Spaghetti inside the Dream Castle.
Make sure you have the 4 Rolling Spaghetti inside your Inventory.
Show the Rolling Spaghetti to Lady.

Locate the scent of spaghetti on the Beach.
  ‧ Wear the Substitute Snout to find the scent.
Catch the 3 Rolling Spaghetti on the Beach.
Make sure you have the 3 Rolling Spaghetti inside your Inventory.
Show the Rolling Spaghetti to Lady.

Locate the scent of more Rolling Spaghetti around the Beach.
  ‧ Wear the Substitute Snout to find the scent.
Enter the Mystical Cave.

Catch all of the Rolling Spaghetti in the Mystical Cave.
  ‧ Gather all the 3 Rolling Spaghetti.
Return to Lady inside the entrance of the Mystical Cave.
Make sure you have all of the 3 Rolling Spaghetti inside your Inventory.
Give all the 3 Rolling Spaghetti to Lady.

The smell of the 3 Rolling Spaghetti triggered a Memory!
  ‧ Open the Memory close to the entrance of the Mystical Cave.
Return to Lady.

quests.name: Life's a (Meat)Ball
objectives:
Are those giant meatballs in the middle of Lady and Tramp's House?
  ‧ Talk to Lady.

Are those giant meatballs in the middle of Lady and Tramp's House?
  ‧ Dig out and gather the Magical Meatballs
  ‧ Show the Magical Meatballs to Lady.
Lady smelled Magical Meatballs in Ursula's House.
Check inside Ursula's House.
Dig out and gather 9 more Magical Meatballs in Ursula's House.
Bring the Magical Meatballs to Lady in Ursula's House.
Investigate Goofy's House for Magical Meatballs.
Dig out and gather 9 more Magical Meatballs in Goofy's House.
Bring the Magical Meatballs to Lady in Goofy's House.
Investigate Mickey's House for more Magical Meatballs.
Dig out and gather 9 more Magical Meatballs in Mickey's House.
Bring the Magical Meatballs to Lady.

Another Memory appeared!
  ‧ Inspect the Memory in Mickey's House.
Return to Lady.

quests.name: A Curious Dish
objectives: You fished up a strange Shiny Tomato...?
Talk to Lady.-

You fished up a strange Shiny Tomato...?
  ‧ Talk to a chef or a wizard about them.
Fish out 6 more Shiny Tomatoes from the Peaceful Meadow, Glade of Trust, and Forest of Valor.
Bring every Shiny Tomato you found to Lady.
Cook a dish combining the Rolling Spaghetti, Magical Meatballs, and Shiny Tomato Sauce.
Make sure to carry the Memorable Spaghetti and Meatballs in your Inventory.
Go to Lady and Tramp's House with the Memorable Spaghetti and Meatballs.
Give the Memorable Spaghetti and Meatballs plate to Lady.

A Memory appeared in Lady and Tramp's House!
  ‧ Examine the Memory.

A curious, shiny license appeared in Lady and Tramp's House!
  ‧ Pick up the Pluto's License.
  ‧ Show the the Pluto's License to Lady.

Reassemble the Well-Worn Dog Collar and Pluto's License at a Crafting Station.
  ‧ Show Pluto's collar to Lady.
